data.description:
Minimum-viable PR to restore useful CI signal without solving the underlying test stability problem. Parent: C11-98.

**Changes**
1. `nightly.yml:459` — add `continue-on-error: true` on `Upload dSYMs to Sentry` step (matches `release.yml:301`). Unblocks 15 days of skipped nightly publishes.
2. `ci.yml:92` — bump build job `timeout-minutes` from 15 → 25. Today's runtime is ~14-16 min; the 15 ceiling is the proximate cause of the "hang" framing.
3. `c11Tests/AppDelegateShortcutRoutingTests.swift:878` — `XCTSkip` `testMinimalModeUsesZeroTopSafeAreaForMainWindowContentView` with a TODO referencing C11-98 / its child. Drops step time from 10:19 → ~8:30.
4. Split the test step in `ci.yml`:
   - `xcodebuild ... -scheme c11-logic test` (hard-fail gate)
   - `xcodebuild ... -scheme c11-unit -only-testing:c11Tests test` (`continue-on-error: true`, advisory until stabilization lands)

**Acceptance**
- `nightly.yml` runs go green end-to-end (Sparkle appcast + artifact upload + tag move all execute even if Sentry upload fails)
- `ci.yml` build job goes green on main with `c11-logic` as gate
- Advisory `c11-unit` step still runs and reports failures, just doesn't fail the job
- The skipped slow test has a TODO + Lattice link in the source

**Out of scope** — fixing the 32 expectation timeouts (that's the sibling stabilization ticket).
data.title: CI unblock: nightly Sentry flag, ci.yml timeout, slow-test skip, scheme split

**Changes**

data.to:
Restore the c11 CI + test signal after v0.48.0 shipped via admin-merge. The `build` job in `ci.yml` has been red on every main commit for 50+ runs because the `c11-unit` test step is misdiagnosed as a hang. Full audit (single source of truth): `notes/build-test-pipeline-audit-2026-05-18.md`.

**Bottom line.** Release path (sign / notarize / Sparkle / Homebrew) is healthy; v0.48.0 round-tripped clean. CI path is broken in a way that masks 32 real test failures, plus two adjacent bit-rots (`nightly.yml` Sentry step, `claude.yml` + `test-e2e.yml`). Four work areas, each shippable on its own; this ticket holds them together so the audit context isn't lost.

---

## Parallel-execution map

Areas **A**, **B**, and **D** can be picked up independently by separate agents at the same time. **C** can start in parallel but its exit criterion (flipping A's advisory flag back to hard-fail) requires A to land first, and its iteration loop is materially easier once **B** lands (lets the owner run host-bound tests locally without stomping the operator's c11).

```
A (CI unblock)         ──┐
                         ├──► C (c11Tests stabilization, multi-day)
B (local runnability)  ──┘            │
                                      └─► A flag flips advisory → hard-fail
D (workflow hygiene)   ── independent of all
```

If multiple agents claim this ticket simultaneously, coordinate by picking distinct areas (claim in a comment: "claiming area B"). Each area ships as its own PR.

---

## Area A — CI unblock (≤1 PR, hours)

Minimum-viable changes to restore useful CI signal without solving the underlying test stability problem.

**Changes**
1. `.github/workflows/nightly.yml:459` — add `continue-on-error: true` on `Upload dSYMs to Sentry` step (matches `release.yml:301`). Unblocks 15 consecutive days of skipped nightly publishes since 2026-05-04.
2. `.github/workflows/ci.yml:92` — bump build-job `timeout-minutes` from 15 → 25. Today's runtime is ~14-16 min; the 15 ceiling is the proximate cause of the "hang" framing.
3. `c11Tests/AppDelegateShortcutRoutingTests.swift:878` — `XCTSkip` `testMinimalModeUsesZeroTopSafeAreaForMainWindowContentView` with a TODO referencing this ticket (and area C). Drops the test-step time from 10:19 → ~8:30.
4. Split the test step in `.github/workflows/ci.yml:186-203` into:
   - `xcodebuild ... -scheme c11-logic test` (hard-fail gate)
   - `xcodebuild ... -scheme c11-unit -only-testing:c11Tests test` (`continue-on-error: true`, advisory until area C lands)

**Acceptance**
- `nightly.yml` runs go green end-to-end (Sparkle appcast + artifact upload + tag move all execute even if Sentry upload fails).
- `ci.yml` build job green on main with `c11-logic` as the gate.
- Advisory `c11-unit` step still runs and reports failures, just doesn't fail the job.
- The skipped slow test has a TODO + Lattice link in source.

---

## Area B — Local test runnability (≈1 PR, ≈1 day)

Make `xcodebuild test -scheme c11-unit` safe to run on Hyperion without stomping the operator's primary c11.

**Root cause** (from audit §2): XCTest host launches the untagged `c11 DEV.app` (bundle id `com.stage11.c11.debug`). `SocketControlSettings.socketPath()` resolves that to `/tmp/c11-debug.sock` — same path any debug build the operator is running uses. The test host then calls `TerminalController.shared.start(socketPath: ...)` at `Sources/AppDelegate.swift:2903-2916`, binding (and on teardown, unlinking) that socket.

**Changes**
1. Runtime guard in `Sources/SocketControlSettings.swift:438-462`. After existing branches: if `XCTestConfigurationFilePath` is in env and the resolver would return `/tmp/c11-debug.sock`, return `/tmp/c11-test-\(getpid()).sock` instead. ~6 lines + a c11LogicTests case.
2. Scheme env var in `GhosttyTabs.xcodeproj/xcshareddata/xcschemes/c11-unit.xcscheme` TestAction:
   ```xml
   <EnvironmentVariables>
     <EnvironmentVariable key="CMUX_TAG" value="local-xctest" isEnabled="YES"/>
   </EnvironmentVariables>
   ```
   Belt-and-braces; self-documents the isolation.
3. Wrapper script `scripts/test-unit-local.sh` (recipe in audit §6): exports `CMUX_SOCKET_PATH=/tmp/c11-test-${USER}-$$.sock`, `CMUX_ALLOW_SOCKET_OVERRIDE=1`, `CMUX_TAG=xctest-${USER}-$$`, then execs `xcodebuild test`.
4. Update `code/c11/CLAUDE.md` to drop the "Don't run xcodebuild test on c11 locally" rule + the PR #164 reference; replace with: "Use `scripts/test-unit-local.sh` for local c11-unit iteration."

**Acceptance**
- Operator can run `scripts/test-unit-local.sh` on Hyperion with `/Applications/c11.app` *and* a `c11 DEV.app` running, and neither dies.
- New c11LogicTests case verifies the socket path is per-PID under XCTest.
- CLAUDE.md no longer mentions the prohibition.

---

## Area C — c11Tests stabilization (multi-day, owner-driven)

Diagnose and fix the 32 `XCTestExpectation` 1-second-timeout failures so the host-bound scheme can return to hard-fail status in CI.

**Failing-test clusters** (recurring across 4+ post-PR-#164 main builds):
- `AppDelegateShortcutRoutingTests` — multiple, starting at `c11Tests/AppDelegateShortcutRoutingTests.swift:2323`
- `GhosttyConfigTests` (`c11Tests/GhosttyConfigTests.swift:1576, 1696`)
- `NotificationBurstCoalescerTests`
- `TabManagerReopenClosedBrowserFocusTests` (`c11Tests/TabManagerUnitTests.swift:974`)
- `TerminalNotificationDirectInteractionTests`
- `BrowserDeveloperToolsVisibilityPersistenceTests`
- `BrowserPanelHostContainerViewTests`

**Plus** the slow-test outlier: `AppDelegateShortcutRoutingTests.testMinimalModeUsesZeroTopSafeAreaForMainWindowContentView` at `c11Tests/AppDelegateShortcutRoutingTests.swift:878-912` — 104-123s wall time (vs 10.5s for the next-slowest test). Quarantined in area A; needs a real fix here.

**Approach**
1. Pull the full failure list from any recent CI run via `gh run view --log` + the `-resultBundlePath` artifact. Add `-resultBundlePath` to area B's wrapper script and to the CI step for ongoing visibility.
2. For each failing test: (a) raise the expectation timeout from 1s to 5-10s if the wait is legitimate, (b) replace polling/timer-based waits with deterministic notification observers, (c) move the test to `c11LogicTests` if it doesn't actually need the host, or (d) quarantine with `XCTSkip` if the test design is wrong.
3. Profile the 104s slow test with `sample(1)`:
   ```bash
   scripts/test-unit-local.sh -only-testing:c11Tests/AppDelegateShortcutRoutingTests/testMinimalModeUsesZeroTopSafeAreaForMainWindowContentView \
     -resultBundlePath /tmp/slow-test.xcresult &
   sleep 30
   sample $(pgrep -n xctest) 5 -file /tmp/c11-unit-sample.txt
   ```
   Determine what `createMainWindow` (`Sources/AppDelegate.swift:6269`) actually does for 100s. Likely SwiftUI scene graph + responder swizzle install — fixing it benefits production launch latency too (relevant to C11-1 hang investigation).
4. Re-enable the quarantined slow test once the actual fix lands.
5. Flip area A's `continue-on-error: true` back off.

**Acceptance**
- `c11-unit` step in CI green on main for 5+ consecutive runs.
- CI flips `c11-unit` from `continue-on-error: true` back to hard-fail (removes the advisory flag).
- Quarantined slow test re-enabled.
- AAR comment on this ticket covering the actual root cause of the timeouts — most likely a class of timing assumption that's wrong on shared-tenant CI runners (portable insight for future test design).

---

## Area D — Workflow / scripts / docs hygiene (independent; ≈1 small PR + 2 decisions)

Independent of A/B/C. Can ship anytime.

**Workflow tightening**
1. `.github/workflows/update-homebrew.yml` — add `timeout-minutes: 10` (currently inherits GitHub's 6h default).
2. `scripts/sparkle_generate_appcast.sh:19-20` — flip default `DOWNLOAD_URL_PREFIX` and `RELEASE_NOTES_URL` from `manaflow-ai/cmux` to `Stage-11-Agentics/c11`, OR require explicit envs (no default). Today `release.yml` exports the correct values so production is fine; the risk is a human regenerating an appcast locally and silently pointing at the wrong fork.
3. `scripts/bump-version.sh:28` — when invoked for a release tag, hard-fail when the Sparkle-floor curl returns 0 bytes (instead of silently falling back to `LATEST_RELEASE_BUILD=""`). The whole point of PR #153 was to prevent shipping a build number lower than the published floor.

**Decisions** (write outcome as a comment on this ticket before implementing)
4. `.github/workflows/claude.yml` — pin floating action tags (`actions/checkout@v6`, `anthropics/claude-code-action@v1`) to SHAs and add the missing `CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN` secret, OR delete the workflow. It has never been invoked.
5. `.github/workflows/test-e2e.yml:212` — rename the hardcoded `cmuxUITests` scheme reference to the current scheme + fix the launch path, OR delete the workflow. Last 3 dispatches failed.

**Docs**
6. `code/c11/CLAUDE.md` "Ghostty submodule workflow" section — update "push to `manaflow`" → "push to `stage11`" (the actual remote name in the checkout; CLAUDE.md doc-drift).

**Acceptance**
- Three workflow tightening changes shipped (1, 2, 3).
- Decisions 4 + 5 written on this ticket and acted on either way (no half-deleted, half-kept state).
- CLAUDE.md ghostty section reflects the real remote layout.

---

## Explicit non-goals

- Adding explicit `ARCHS="arm64 x86_64"` to `release.yml`. Audit confirmed the shipped DMG is already universal (`ONLY_ACTIVE_ARCH = NO` in pbxproj). Belt-and-braces, not a fix.
- Rewriting the "self-referential" Homebrew SHA gate. It validates heredoc substitution correctness, which is what's needed; download integrity is already gated by the 5-retry HTTP loop.

---

## History

This ticket previously lived as a parent C11-98 + four `subtask_of` children (C11-99, C11-100, C11-101, C11-102). Consolidated 2026-05-18 because the parent had no deliverable of its own — a container-shape violation of Lattice's "every ticket is a work item" metaphor. See `feedback_no_container_tickets.md` in the operator's memory store and the sharpened "Anti-pattern: container tickets" paragraph in `/Users/atin/.claude/skills/lattice/SKILL.md`. The four children were archived in favor of the area-sections above.

provenance.reason: Consolidate four work areas into single ticket (drop container parent C11-98)

data.from: CI unblock: nightly Sentry flag, ci.yml timeout, slow-test skip, scheme split
data.to: c11 CI + test pipeline restore (4 work areas, parallelizable)

provenance.reason: Retitle and retag after consolidating C11-98/100/101/102 work areas
Retitle and retag after consolidating C11-98/100/101/102 work areas

data.body: Consolidated 2026-05-18 from the earlier C11-98 (parent) + C11-99/100/101/102 (subtask_of children) layout. The parent C11-98 had no deliverable of its own — a container-shape violation of Lattice's 'every ticket is a work item' metaphor. C11-100 (Local test runnability → Area B), C11-101 (c11Tests stabilization → Area C), and C11-102 (Workflow hygiene → Area D) folded into this ticket's area sections; the original C11-99 scope is now Area A. C11-98, C11-100, C11-101, C11-102 archived. See /Users/atin/.claude/skills/lattice/SKILL.md 'Anti-pattern: container tickets' for the sharpened guidance and feedback_no_container_tickets.md in the operator memory store for the rule-of-thumb.

**Orchestration kickoff — 2026-05-18**

Architect (`agent:claude-opus-4-7-architect`) running the Stage 11 Lattice Orchestration Workflow against this ticket. Phase 1 collapsed — this ticket's description + `notes/build-test-pipeline-audit-2026-05-18.md` (committed at 3246d82bf) serve as SPEC + BUILDPLAN.

**Configuration**
- Autonomy: **Fully Autonomous**
- Delegator cap: 2 (not the per-area count of 4 — the four areas group cleanly into two streams)
- Master Validator: off (only 2 streams)
- Result Validator: on
- Lattice tracking: single ticket (not re-split). Both delegators update C11-99 with `lattice attach` notes per area.

**Delegator split**
- **Delegator 1 — A+B+D infra pass** (`delegator:abd-infra`): sequential A → B → D, three PRs from worktree `code/c11-worktrees/c11-99-abd`. A first for fastest CI restore.
- **Delegator 2 — C stabilization** (`delegator:c-stab`): the multi-day diagnosis + fix of the 32 expectation-timeout failures + the 104s slow test. Worktree `code/c11-worktrees/c11-99-c`. Starts in parallel; iteration loop accelerates once B lands.

**Pre-decided choices** (under Fully Autonomous)
- Area D — `.github/workflows/{claude,test-e2e}.yml`: **delete both**. Neither has ever served value; ~30 min to re-add either if needed.
- Area D — `scripts/sparkle_generate_appcast.sh`: flip default `DOWNLOAD_URL_PREFIX` / `RELEASE_NOTES_URL` to `Stage-11-Agentics/c11`.
- Area D — `scripts/bump-version.sh`: hard-fail when invoked for a release tag and the Sparkle-floor curl returns 0 bytes (vs silently falling back).

**Handoff artifacts on disk**
- `.lattice/orchestration/run-state.md`
- `.lattice/orchestration/validation-plan.md` (per-area acceptance criteria the Phase 4 Result Validator walks)
- `.lattice/orchestration/agents.md` (Orchestrator populates as it dispatches)

**Out of scope** (audit-confirmed non-goals)
- Explicit `ARCHS="arm64 x86_64"` on `release.yml` — shipped DMG already universal via `ONLY_ACTIVE_ARCH = NO`
- Rewriting the Homebrew SHA "gate" — validates heredoc substitution, which is the actual need
- `cmux.sparkle.automaticChecksMigration.v2` UserDefaults key rename — needs a separate migration cycle

Orchestrator pane will spawn next; this Architect session steps aside once Phase 3 starts.
Reconciliation: PR #184 merged into main; deliverable shipped.
